scenarios.title: Citizen in home area
scenarios.summary: Rights invocation and incident-specific accountability steps for citizens working inside their usual local context.

incidents.title: Stopped at a checkpoint
incidents.summary: Reduce friction, identify the right in question, record the incident, and preserve a later accountability trail.

sources.title: Kenya Bill of Rights summary
sources.rationale: Supports rights, dignity, privacy, movement, and access to justice.

sources.title: OSF focus area: Democratic Practice
sources.rationale: Supports accountable public interaction and challenge to opaque power.

sources.title: Checkpoint interaction guidance
sources.rationale: Provides low-risk handling guidance and delayed accountability logic.

actions.title: Record what happened
actions.description: Capture the place, time, agency, and what was demanded or refused without escalating on-site.

actions.title: Queue an accountability report
actions.description: Save a delayed report to be sent when it is safer or when connectivity returns.

actions.title: Invoke the relevant right
actions.description: Identify whether movement, dignity, privacy, or access to justice is the strongest right in the incident.

incidents.title: Being denied aid or service
incidents.summary: Document the refusal, assess immediate safety, and prepare the safest escalation path.

sources.title: Aid denial escalation path
sources.rationale: Defines the minimum incident facts required for later remedy-seeking.

sources.title: OSF focus area: Rights and Dignity
sources.rationale: Frames access and dignity as a rights issue rather than a service inconvenience.

sources.title: Kenya civic rights starter note
sources.rationale: Provides Kenya-first framing for public-interest and civic escalation.

actions.title: Capture the refusal details
actions.description: Note what was denied, who denied it, and whether documents or registration were referenced.

actions.title: Check immediate safety risk
actions.description: Separate urgent protection needs from slower institutional follow-up.

actions.title: Queue a delayed aid complaint
actions.description: Prepare a complaint packet for later delivery to a verified observer or institution.

incidents.title: Need to report abuse safely
incidents.summary: Preserve evidence in low-risk form, minimize identifying exposure, and choose a safer reporting path.

sources.title: ICRC conflict protection note
sources.rationale: Supports harm-reduction logic in insecure settings.

sources.title: Safety standard for peace queries
sources.rationale: Defines what safe answers should avoid encouraging.

sources.title: OSF focus area: Rights and Dignity
sources.rationale: Frames abuse reporting as a dignity and rights issue.

actions.title: Minimize identifying detail
actions.description: Avoid names, exact locations, and contacts unless a trusted emergency responder requires them.

actions.title: Preserve a low-risk record
actions.description: Save a short, factual account for later secure escalation.

actions.title: Choose a safer reporting path
actions.description: Use queue, SMS intake, or a verified observer path depending on the current risk level.

scenarios.title: Displaced in-country
scenarios.summary: Low-friction accountability steps for people displaced within the country and facing unstable connectivity, mobility, and documentation.

incidents.title: Movement or access risk
incidents.summary: Reduce exposure, identify safe routing choices, and log the incident for later remedy-seeking.

sources.title: Displacement-safe reporting
sources.rationale: Supports low-risk, delayed accountability for displaced users.

sources.title: ICRC conflict protection note
sources.rationale: Supports civilian safety choices in insecure conditions.

sources.title: OSF initiative: Transformative Peace in Africa
sources.rationale: Aligns with local, conflict-affected, community-centered response logic.

actions.title: Mark the access barrier
actions.description: Document what movement or checkpoint barrier is preventing safe access.

actions.title: Queue a delayed movement complaint
actions.description: Prepare the case for later delivery if direct complaint is unsafe.

actions.title: Find nearby support
actions.description: Use the nearby-help path if location sharing is safe and necessary.

incidents.title: Lost or missing documents
incidents.summary: Identify the missing document, the immediate service risk, and the lowest-friction next step to restore access.

sources.title: UNHCR displacement support note
sources.rationale: Relevant for displacement documentation and protection support.

sources.title: Displacement-safe reporting
sources.rationale: Supports low-risk disclosure for displaced users.

sources.title: OSF focus area: Equity in Governance
sources.rationale: Frames documentation barriers as governance-access issues.

actions.title: Identify the missing document
actions.description: Specify what is missing and which service or protection access is blocked by it.

actions.title: Capture last known details
actions.description: Record the last place, date, and agency linked to the document without unsafe over-disclosure.

actions.title: Queue a documentation help request
actions.description: Prepare a request for later routing to a support organization or authority.

scenarios.title: Cross-border refugee
scenarios.summary: Low-risk accountability and support actions for cross-border users navigating protection, identity, and border-related constraints.

incidents.title: Delayed or blocked at a border
incidents.summary: Reduce identifying exposure, document the restriction, and prepare a safe protection-oriented escalation path.

sources.title: UNHCR displacement support note
sources.rationale: Relevant for refugee protection and border-support context.

sources.title: Safety standard for peace queries
sources.rationale: Prevents unsafe disclosure of exact identity and movement details.

actions.title: Note the border restriction
actions.description: Capture what was delayed or denied and whether protection status was discussed.

actions.title: Protect identity details
actions.description: Avoid disclosing names or exact locations unless a trusted protection actor requires them.

actions.title: Queue refugee support request
actions.description: Prepare a delayed message for a support organization or observer when sending becomes safe.
